generated_oml:
import "http://example.org/base" as base
import "http://example.org/DTDFVocab" as DTDFVocab

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring hoist swinging motion",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistSwingAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring wind speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]
instance CartPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring cart position",

]
instance CartSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring cart speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartSpeedDataTransmitted
]

    base:desc "Sensor measuring hoist position",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance HoistSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring hoist speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor for horizontal movement"
]
instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor for vertical movement"
]
instance TMC4671CartController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart stepper motor"
]
instance TMC4671HoistController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist stepper motor"
]
instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]
instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller executing actuation commands for motors and electromagnet"
]

instance HoistSwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionSensor
]
instance CartSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartSpeedSensor
]
instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionSensor
]
instance HoistSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistSpeedSensor
]

instance HoistSwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time hoist swing angle data",

]
instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance CartPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time cart position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance CartSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time cart speed data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance HoistPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time hoist position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance HoistSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time hoist speed data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance AutodeskFusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane structure in Autodesk Fusion 360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella, PythonGantrylib
]
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]
instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for trajectory validation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for digital twin services",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, ValidationService, FaultDetectionService, MQTTBrokerService
]
instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane state data",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]
instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time crane data",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]
instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]
instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, ValidationService
]
instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool",
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemModelingService
]
instance KiCad : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hardware design tool for PCB and circuit design",
    DTDFVocab:enables HardwareDesignService
]
instance ArduinoIDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development environment for Arduino microcontroller firmware",
    DTDFVocab:enables HardwareDevelopmentService
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models for gantry crane movement",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data logging of crane state to TimescaleDB via MQTT",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]
instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based visualization of crane real-time data",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing simulation results with real measurements",
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlert
]
instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using time series classification techniques",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight
]
instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT broker service for data communication",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]
instance SystemModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System modeling using Capella",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemDesignInsight
]
instance HardwareDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Hardware design using KiCad",
    DTDFVocab:provides HardwareDesignInsight
]
instance HardwareDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Arduino firmware development",
    DTDFVocab:provides FirmwareDevelopmentInsight
]

]

]

]

    base:desc "Fault localization via time series classification techniques"
]

]
instance SystemDesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

    base:desc "PCB and circuit design insights from KiCad"
]

]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]
instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp",
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, TMC4671CartController, TMC4671HoistController, Electromagnet, ArduinoMicrocontroller, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]
instance GantryCraneSystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment GantryCraneSystem
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service executed via the Control Application using the Physical Crane Interface to drive motors and electromagnet."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization with real-time data logging and validation; trajectory simulation and execution occur in near real-time for dynamic control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "C4 Model-based orchestration where physical components interface with Dockerized digital services via MQTT, forming a unified system for data flow and control."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as-designed (CAD models), as-manufactured (BOM and hardware), and as-operated (real-time sensor data and control) phases of the crane's lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between simulated and real trajectory data; confidence bounds in Grafana indicate simulation validity thresholds."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Physical Crane Interface connects to hardware controllers via Arduino-based serial communication."
]

    base:desc "Docker containers for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard deployed on a single personal computer; gantrylib Python module installed via pip."
]
